equipment.name: Split-Hilt Blade
equipment.description: Watch your fingers-the handle is held on by a prayer and some twine.

equipment.name: Dull Claymore
equipment.description: An oversized blade with a chipped edge and heavy swing.

equipment.name: Battered Helm
equipment.description: A dented helmet that still catches the worst of a blow.

equipment.name: Hide Vest
equipment.description: Stitched hide layers hardened by mud and weather.

equipment.name: Stitched Pelt Grips
equipment.description: Rough pelt wraps that keep your grip from slipping.

equipment.name: Worn Leather Boots
equipment.description: Soft leather boots with soles worn nearly smooth.

equipment.name: Jagged Bone Dirk
equipment.description: A short dagger carved from bone and sharpened unevenly.

equipment.name: Rusted Gladius
equipment.description: Corroded steel with a surviving point and edge.

fruit.name: Fruit of Instinct
fruit.description: A strange, pulsing fruit. Eating it awakens something primal within you; your body begins to act on its own.

fruit.name: Fruit of Assassination
fruit.description: Dark flesh and a metallic scent hinting at sudden endings.
fruit.effect: If the target is below 35% hp, perform a killing blow, instantly killing them.
